headline: EXERCISE VIGILANCE DUE TO INCREASED RISK OF ATTACKS LINKED TO MIDDLE EAST CONFLICTS
body: The risk of isolated and extremism-linked attacks in Europe increased amid the Israel-US military operation against Iran. Several incidents of targeted attacks have occurred across Europe in recent weeks, prompting some countries to enhance security measures.

headline: AVIATION ALERT (GULF REGION) — ELEVATED THREAT TO COMMERCIAL AIRCRAFT
body: Hostile intercepts and active SAM activity reported across Iraq and Iran airspace. Operators are advised to avoid overflight of ORBB and OIIX FIRs above FL180.

headline: ELEVATED RISK OF MILITARY ACTION OVER IRANIAN AIRSPACE
body: Continued risk of cross-border strikes. Operators should consider alternate routings via UTAK or HECC.

headline: ROSTOV FIR — ACTIVE CONFLICT ZONE, AVOID OVERFLIGHT
body: Active SAM activity and risk of misidentification. ICAO has advised carriers to avoid the Rostov FIR.

headline: YEMEN — HOUTHI MISSILE ACTIVITY
body: Increased risk of advanced SAM and missile threats. Operators should avoid OYSC FIR.

headline: HANTAVIRUS CLUSTER LINKED TO CRUISE SHIP — MONITOR DEVELOPMENTS
body: A small cluster of hantavirus cases has been linked to a cruise ship docking in Zurich's vicinity. Monitor for travel advisories.

headline: SEVERE THUNDERSTORM ACTIVITY ALONG TRANSCONTINENTAL CORRIDOR
body: Convective SIGMETs in effect across the central US. Expect rerouting and delays on PHX-JFK and similar routings.

headline: INCREASED POLICE PRESENCE — LONDON
body: UK terrorism threat level raised to 'severe' (second-highest). Additional plain-clothed officers near transport hubs.

headline: JFK — INCREASED TSA STAFFING DUE TO ELEVATED THREAT POSTURE
body: Expect longer screening times. Allow extra time for departures.

headline: PHX — DUST STORM ADVISORY
body: Periodic haboobs reducing visibility. Brief departure delays possible.

headline: CHOLERA OUTBREAK — NAIROBI
body: WHO confirms ongoing cholera outbreak. Vaccinate before travel.

headline: BERLIN — DEMONSTRATIONS NEAR EMBASSY ROW
body: Avoid Mitte district during scheduled demonstrations.

headline: OEJN — INCREASED MISSILE THREAT FROM YEMEN
body: Operators should monitor advisories. Brief stand-downs possible.

headline: FRA — LOW VISIBILITY OPS THIS MORNING
body: Fog reducing arrivals to single-runway operations until 11:00 local.

headline: LAX — TEMPORARY ROAD CLOSURES, PROTEST ACTIVITY
body: Ground transport disruptions expected through the weekend.

headline: NAT TRACKS — TEMPORARY OCEANIC RESTRICTIONS
body: Reduced lateral separation in effect on NAT-A and NAT-B.

headline: FCO — SEASONAL FLU UPTICK
body: Standard precautions advised.

headline: CAIRO — SINAI REGION ADVISORY
body: Operators should avoid low-altitude flight near Sinai.

headline: DEN — HIGH WIND ADVISORY
body: Crosswind component nearing limits on RW34L. Expect runway changes.

headline: AMS — INCREASED PRESENCE OF MARECHAUSSEE
body: Routine elevated screening for inbound flights from MENA region.

headline: DMM — IMMEDIATE MISSILE THREAT, GROUND STOP IN EFFECT
body: Active ground stop. Inbound traffic diverting to OERK and OEDR.

headline: HND — TYPHOON SYSTEM APPROACHING
body: Significant delays expected over next 48 hours.

headline: HKG — INCREASED IMMIGRATION SCRUTINY
body: Expect longer arrival processing times.

headline: MIA — INCREASED MARITIME PATROLS
body: Routine. No operational impact expected.

headline: BRUSSELS — ELEVATED THREAT POSTURE NEAR EU INSTITUTIONS
body: Avoid the European Quarter during scheduled events.
